title: ferray-ma: no masked array broadcasting in arithmetic ops
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's MaskedArray arithmetic broadcasts automatically: a masked (3,4) array + a masked (4,) array works. ferray-ma's masked_add, masked_sub, etc. all require identical shapes: 'if a.shape() != b.shape() { return Err }'. This means basic patterns like centering (data - data.mean()) or normalizing are impossible without manual broadcast. Add broadcasting to masked binary operations.
